title: New Worlds: The Cradle of Civilization
original_title: New Worlds, The Cradle of Civilization
overview: Filmed during a hot summer night in Athens, Greece, New Worlds: The Cradle of Civilization, captures the final performance of Bill Murray and Jan Vogler’s 2018 European “New Worlds” tour.
